title: Eremosis solorzanoana
taxonomy: Eremosis solorzanoana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, belonging to the subfamily Pertyoideae. It is native to Peru and is a part of the Eremosis genus. Within the genus Eremosis, Eremosis solorzanoana is classified as a unique species. The classification of Eremosis solorzanoana is based on its distinct morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the Asteraceae family, it shares common traits with other related plant species.
